articles.title: 近半数临近退休的澳大利亚人担忧积蓄耗尽
articles.title_original: Half of Australians Near Retirement Fear Running Out of Cash
articles.summary: 澳大利亚企业监管机构最新发布的一项研究结果显示，该国近半数临近退休的人群担忧自己退休后会耗尽积蓄，同时对停止工作后能否管理好个人财务缺乏足够信心。
articles.summary_original: Almost half of Australians approaching retirement fear running out of money and lack confidence managing their finances once they stop working, according to new research from the corporate regulator.

articles.title: 着力建设崇德向善的文明城市 - 光明网理论

articles.title: 主产国伊朗战事致开心果价格创八年新高
articles.title_original: Pistachio Prices Hit Eight-Year High on War in Major Grower Iran
articles.summary: 伊朗是全球主要开心果产区，当地战事打乱了涵盖关键燃料、化肥的全球供应链，进而推动该国出产的热门坚果开心果价格上涨，目前全球开心果价格已创下八年来新高，区域冲突正扰动全球农产品价格。
articles.summary_original: After upending global supply chains that move critical fuels and fertilizers, the war in Iran has pushed prices of a popular nut grown in the country - pistachios - to an eight-year high.

articles.title: 晶采观察丨以高水平开放引入新供给 第六届消博会看点十足 - 新华报业网
articles.summary: 第六届中国国际消费品博览会如期举办，这是海南自贸港封关后的首场消博会，展会以开放引领全球消费、创新驱动美好生活为方向，江西组织51家企业组团参展，集结六大主题板块的赣鄱好物，本届展会看点十足。

articles.title: 伊朗战事实时更新：美国将封锁伊朗港口往来船只
articles.title_original: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. to Blockade Ships From Iranian Ports

articles.summary_original: The blockade on ships “entering or departing Iranian ports and coastal areas” will begin on Monday, U.S. Central Command said. But U.S. forces will not impede vessels transiting the Strait of Hormuz, a step back from President Trump’s earlier vow.

articles.title: 国会议员埃里克·斯沃尔韦尔因性不当行为指控退出加州州长竞选

articles.summary_original: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.

articles.title: 36氪首发｜港中文博士和前大疆智能制造负责人创业，要做AI时代的“个性化乐高”

articles.title: 和谈失败加剧通胀担忧 全球债券下跌
articles.title_original: Global Bonds Slide as Failure of Talks Adds to Inflation Fears

articles.summary_original: The failure of peace talks between the US and Iran is further shifting the bond market’s focus to inflation and reinforcing expectations that interest rates will stay higher for longer.

articles.title: 美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡对能源市场意味着什么

articles.summary_original: As President Trump threatens a US blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Bloomberg's Stephen Stapczynski reports on the possible impact on oil and fuel supplies. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡恐加剧亚洲盟友及中国困境

articles.summary_original: US President Donald Trump’s move to blockade the Strait of Hormuz risks deepening an unfolding economic crisis for Asia’s energy-dependent economies, including America’s allies in the region and China.

articles.title: 总书记的关切·落地的回响｜协同守护 千年运河正青春 - 中国网新闻中心

articles.title: 前官员称不确定性下日本央行一贯立场为维持政策不变
articles.title_original: BOJ’s Usual Stance Amid Uncertainty Is to Hold, Ex-Official Says
articles.summary: 日本央行一名曾负责货币政策的前执行理事表示，身处高度不确定性环境时，日本央行制定政策的一贯做法是保持观望，这也使得日本央行本月货币政策会议的结果目前仍难以预判。
articles.summary_original: The Bank of Japan’s usual approach to conducting policy at times of high uncertainty would be to wait and see, making the likely outcome of a meeting this month too close to call, according to a former executive director who oversaw monetary policy at the central bank.

articles.title: SVB能源公司瓦赫苏里谈美国封锁霍尔木兹海峡
articles.title_original: SVB Energy's Vakhshouri on US Blockade of Hormuz
articles.summary: 美伊周末会谈未达成协议，美国随即推进霍尔木兹海峡封锁行动，加剧了本就震荡全球市场的能源危机。SVB能源国际创始人兼总裁萨拉·瓦赫苏里做客彭博社《亚洲贸易》节目，就当前能源市场前景发表看法。
articles.summary_original: Sara Vakhshouri, Founder and President at SVB Energy International, discusses her outlook for energy markets as the US moved to blockade the Strait of Hormuz after weekend talks between Washington and Tehran failed to reach a deal, escalating a global energy crisis that’s rocked markets. She speaks with Haidi Stroud-Watts and Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

articles.title: 美军称将对伊朗港口海上交通实施封锁--国际 - 人民网国际
